hard_fail_conditions: a semantic, psychological, religious, sociological, neuroscientific, or AI law is inserted as a root theorem
meaning is assigned before q_MEMK and O_MEMK pass
the target interpretation is inserted into the encoder, quotient, coefficient, or loss
a ROOT_THEOREM depends on empirical tape, discovered law, calibration, or numerical procedure
event occurrence, event trace, memory, experience, and knowledge are collapsed into one object
social acceptance is reported as sufficient proof of knowledge
local or large-scale convention is promoted to global or absolute truth without transport tests
informational work is reported in physical energy units without an independently checked bridge
shock, awakening, subjective certainty, or life change is reported as truth without invariant and epistemic gates
adapter rank, loss weights, thresholds, or semantic temperature are selected after held-out outcomes are visible
old meanings or minority conventions are deleted rather than retained as lineage or residue
LoRA is presented as a demonstrated biological mechanism
a transient experience is promoted to durable knowledge, identity, or transformation without persistence
a required source lock, checksum, positive control, negative control, abstention control, metric, or tolerance is missing
required_nonclaims: informational work is not physical energy
global convention is not absolute truth

permitted_temporal_feedback.sequence: meaning -> experience -> memory -> knowledge/view/identity -> next meaning
permitted_temporal_feedback.condition: ordered indices only; no static provenance cycle
